eras.label: 1960s
eras.summary: Warm analog recordings, live bands, vocal-forward arrangements, early studio experimentation, and the rise of soul, rock, folk, and psychedelic music.

genres.label: Motown-inspired soul
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1960s soul-inspired warm chord progression, handclaps, walking bassline, tight live drums, brass accents, call-and-response energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific Motown songs, melodies, lyrics, singers, or arrangements.

genres.label: Psychedelic rock
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1960s psychedelic rock-inspired electric guitars, swirling organ, loose live drums, tape delay, dreamy reverb, experimental studio atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific psychedelic rock songs, bands, lyrics, or guitar riffs.

genres.label: Folk pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1960s folk-pop-inspired acoustic guitar strumming, gentle bass, soft percussion, warm intimate room sound, nostalgic melodic movement
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific folk songs, lyrics, singers, or melodies.

genres.label: Surf rock
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1960s surf-rock-inspired clean electric guitar, spring reverb, driving drums, bright bassline, beach-radio energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific surf rock riffs or melodies.

eras.label: 1970s
eras.summary: Dancefloor grooves, lush strings, funk basslines, analog synths, longer arrangements, and the rise of club-oriented production.

genres.label: Disco
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1970s disco-inspired four-on-the-floor drums, octave bassline, lush strings, rhythm guitar, piano stabs, glittering dancefloor atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific disco songs, hooks, lyrics, basslines, or vocal arrangements.

genres.label: Funk
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1970s funk-inspired syncopated bassline, tight drums, wah guitar, brass punches, clavinet-style rhythm, energetic groove
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific funk riffs, basslines, lyrics, or artists.

genres.label: Progressive rock
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1970s progressive-rock-inspired analog synth layers, electric guitar, shifting sections, live drums, dramatic atmospheric build
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific progressive rock compositions or bands.

genres.label: Early electronic
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1970s early-electronic-inspired analog sequencer pulses, warm synth arpeggios, minimal drum machine rhythm, cosmic atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific electronic compositions, melodies, or artists.

eras.label: 1980s
eras.display_name: 1980s: Synth-pop, New Wave, Electro-funk & Arena Sound
eras.summary: Bright synths, gated drums, drum machines, glossy production, big choruses, electronic basslines, and MTV-era sonic drama.

genres.label: Synth-pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1980s synth-pop-inspired bright analog synth chords, electronic drums, pulsing bassline, gated snare, glossy nostalgic atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific synth-pop songs, vocal melodies, lyrics, or artists.

genres.label: New wave
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1980s new-wave-inspired angular guitar, punchy bass, dry drum machine, bright synth accents, stylish energetic rhythm
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific new wave songs, riffs, lyrics, or bands.

genres.label: Electro-funk
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1980s electro-funk-inspired drum machine groove, slap bass or synth bass, vocoder-like texture, bright stabs, dancefloor energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific electro-funk hooks, basslines, or vocal phrases.

genres.label: Arena rock
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1980s arena-rock-inspired big drums, wide electric guitars, anthemic chord progression, dramatic reverb, stadium-scale energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific arena rock songs, choruses, lyrics, or guitar riffs.

eras.label: 1990s
eras.summary: Club culture, underground electronic scenes, sample-based textures, alternative rock, atmospheric beats, and polished R&B grooves.

genres.label: Deep house
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1990s deep-house-inspired four-on-the-floor drums, warm organ stabs, round bassline, soft pads, underground club atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific house tracks, samples, vocal hooks, or DJ signatures.

genres.label: Techno
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1990s techno-inspired driving kick, repetitive synth sequence, industrial percussion, minimal bass, dark warehouse atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific techno tracks, sequences, or producers.

genres.label: Trip-hop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1990s trip-hop-inspired downtempo breakbeat, dusty bass, moody keys, vinyl texture, cinematic smoky atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific trip-hop songs, samples, vocal melodies, or artists.

genres.label: Alternative / grunge
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1990s alternative-rock-inspired distorted guitars, live drums, heavy bass, raw room sound, melancholic chord movement
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific grunge songs, riffs, lyrics, or singers.

genres.label: 90s R&B
genres.safe_prompt_style: 1990s R&B-inspired smooth drum groove, warm electric piano, rounded bassline, soft chord extensions, polished late-night atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific R&B songs, vocal runs, lyrics, or artists.

eras.label: 2000s
eras.display_name: 2000s: Pop, Garage, Electroclash, Indie & Digital Club
eras.summary: Digital production, shiny pop compression, club beats, indie guitars, early internet aesthetics, and crossover electronic sounds.

genres.label: Filtered disco house
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2000s filtered-disco-house-inspired compressed drums, sidechain pulse, chopped disco-like rhythm guitar texture, bright filter sweeps, euphoric club energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific French house artists, samples, melodies, robot voices, or hooks.

genres.label: UK garage / 2-step
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2000s UK-garage-inspired shuffled 2-step drums, sub bass, chopped vocal-like texture without words, glossy chords, nighttime city energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific garage tracks, vocal samples, lyrics, or MC phrases.

genres.label: 2000s indie rock
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2000s indie-rock-inspired jangly guitars, steady drums, melodic bassline, dry vocal-band arrangement without vocals, energetic rehearsal-room sound
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific indie rock songs, riffs, lyrics, or bands.

genres.label: Y2K pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2000s Y2K-pop-inspired glossy digital drums, bright synth bass, sparkling pads, compressed pop arrangement, futuristic early-digital shine
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific pop songs, lyrics, vocal melodies, or artists.

eras.label: 2010s
eras.summary: Festival drops, trap drums, polished streaming-era pop, bright synths, huge low end, and maximal digital production.

genres.label: Festival EDM
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2010s festival-EDM-inspired big build-up, sidechained synth chords, four-on-the-floor kick, wide supersaw lead, euphoric drop energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific EDM drops, melodies, vocal hooks, or producers.

genres.label: Trap-pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2010s trap-pop-inspired crisp hi-hats, deep 808 bass, sparse atmospheric chords, snappy snare, moody modern pop energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific trap songs, flows, lyrics, vocal melodies, or producers.

genres.label: Alt-pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2010s alt-pop-inspired minimal beat, intimate synth texture, soft bass, unusual percussion, emotional restrained atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific alt-pop singers, lyrics, melodies, or production signatures.

genres.label: Future bass
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2010s future-bass-inspired bright detuned chords, sidechain movement, chopped vocal-like texture without words, punchy drums, emotional digital glow
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific future bass drops, hooks, vocal samples, or producers.

eras.label: 2020s
eras.display_name: 2020s: Hyperpop, Amapiano, Lo-fi, Bedroom Pop & AI-era Electronic
eras.summary: Platform-native music culture, genre blending, short-form hooks, bedroom production, global club rhythms, and experimental AI-era textures.

genres.label: Hyperpop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2020s hyperpop-inspired distorted synths, bright pitched textures without lyrics, glitchy percussion, fast digital edits, maximal playful energy
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific hyperpop artists, vocal styles, lyrics, or melodies.

genres.label: Amapiano-inspired groove
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2020s amapiano-inspired log-drum-like bass pattern, relaxed percussion, airy chords, rolling groove, warm late-night dance atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific amapiano songs, vocal chants, melodies, or producers.

genres.label: Lo-fi chill
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2020s lo-fi-chill-inspired dusty drums, soft jazz-like chords, warm bass, tape noise, relaxed study-room atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific lo-fi tracks, samples, melodies, or channels.

genres.label: Bedroom pop
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2020s bedroom-pop-inspired soft synths, muted drums, warm guitar texture, intimate DIY production, dreamy nostalgic mood
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific bedroom-pop artists, lyrics, vocal melodies, or songs.

genres.label: AI-era electronic
genres.safe_prompt_style: 2020s AI-era electronic-inspired evolving synth textures, generative arpeggios, clean sub bass, glitch details, futuristic emotional atmosphere
genres.avoid: Do not imitate specific AI-generated tracks, artists, or copyrighted material.
